info.name: EV Rental GO — API Integration Tests
info.description:
Sprint 1 Integration Tests

▶ วิธีใช้
1. Import Collection + Environment (EV Rental GO — Local Dev)
2. เลือก Environment ที่มุมขวาบน
3. Run แต่ละ folder ได้เลย — แต่ละ folder จะ auto-login เป็น super_admin ก่อนทุก request อัตโนมัติ
4. IDs จะ auto-save จาก response

exec: // ─── Auto-inject session cookie on every request ───────────────
// ─── Auto-capture session cookie on every response ─────────────
// Auto re-login as super_admin if session changed to viewer
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }

body.raw:
{
  "name": "ทดสอบ นามสกุล",
  "phone": "099-999-9999",
  "driverType": "Grab",
  "email": "test.new@email.com",
  "address": "999 ถ.ทดสอบ กรุงเทพฯ"
}

item.name: POST Re-login as Super Admin (before KYC rejection)
POST Create Customer (for KYC rejection test)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "ทดสอบ KYC ปฏิเสธ",
  "phone": "088-888-8888",
  "driverType": "Bolt",
  "email": "kyc.reject.{{$timestamp}}@evrentalgo.com",
  "address": "456 ถ.ทดสอบ กรุงเทพฯ"
}

exec: body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }
// Prefer active, then overdue — any non-completed contract works for the PATCH tests
const editable = data.find(c => c.status === 'active') || data.find(c => c.status === 'overdue') || data[0];
pm.test('Filter works — all results are overdue', () => {
// Contract may already be completed from a previous test run — accept both outcomes
pm.test('Completed or already locked (200 or 409)', () => pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(code));
// Already completed — this contract is already a valid target for the lock test
pm.test('Error message in Thai', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.include('ปิดแล้ว'));
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }

body.raw:

  "customerName": "ทดสอบ ระบบ",
  "vehiclePlate": "ทส-0001",
  "billingType": "monthly",
  "description": "ค่าเช่ารถทดสอบ",
  "amount": 15000,
  "dueDate": "30/06/2024"

item.name: PATCH Invoice — Mark as Paid + slip

exec: // Save this newly-paid invoice as the canonical paid ID for the 409 test below.
pm.test('Error in Thai', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.include('ชำระแล้ว'));

body.raw:
{
  "customerName": "ทดสอบ ลบ Invoice",
  "vehiclePlate": "ทส-0002",
  "billingType": "monthly",
  "description": "Invoice สำหรับทดสอบการลบ",
  "amount": 8000,
  "dueDate": "30/06/2024"
}

exec: // Users folder always needs super_admin (not just admin)
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }
// Override: login as viewer for this one request only
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'viewer@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
if (sc) { const m = sc.match(/session=([^;]+)/); if (m) pm.environment.set('sessionToken', m[1]); }

item.name: POST Logout (clear session cookie from jar)

exec: // Clear the env var too so collection prerequest stops injecting the Cookie header.
// The server's Set-Cookie response removes the cookie from Postman's cookie jar.

item.name: POST Re-login as Super Admin (restore session)
